name: Anime Openings
author: Beatify Community
description: 100+ anime opening themes — from 2000s classics to the latest seasonal hits. Kenshi Yonezu, LiSA, YOASOBI, Creepy Nuts, Aimer and more. Requested via the in-app playlist funnel (#878).

songs.title: IRIS OUT

songs.fun_fact_nl: Titelsong van de film 'Chainsaw Man – The Movie: Reze Arc' (2025).

songs.title: オトノケ - Otonoke

songs.fun_fact_nl: Openingstune van 'Dandadan' (2024) — Creepy Nuts na hun virale 'Bling-Bang-Bang-Born'.

songs.title: 百花繚乱

songs.title: 革命道中 - On The Way

songs.title: KICK BACK
songs.fun_fact: Opening of 'Chainsaw Man' (2022) — the first anime song to be certified Gold by the RIAA in the US.
songs.fun_fact_de: Opening von 'Chainsaw Man' (2022) — der erste Anime-Song mit RIAA-Gold-Auszeichnung in den USA.
songs.fun_fact_es: Opening de 'Chainsaw Man' (2022), la primera canción de anime con disco de oro de la RIAA en EE. UU.
songs.fun_fact_fr: Générique de 'Chainsaw Man' (2022), première chanson d'anime certifiée or par la RIAA aux États-Unis.
songs.fun_fact_nl: Opening van 'Chainsaw Man' (2022) — het eerste animenummer met RIAA-goud in de VS.
